title: Linociera hassleriana
taxonomy: Linociera hassleriana is classified in the family Sapotaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the sapote family. It belongs to the order Ebenales, which is an order of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions. Within the Sapotaceae family, Linociera hassleriana is a member of the genus Linociera. This genus is a part of the larger group of plants known as the angiosperms, which are flowering plants that produce seeds enclosed within a fruit.
